tweets.text:
You've been copying outfits from people who've never seen your body, your wardrobe, or your life.

Every impulse buy that never gets worn? That's their style - not yours.

Real style is what works for YOUR body and YOUR vibe.

Try on real outfits from real brands - no guessing, no sponsored bias. Just what looks good on you.

There's an app that does exactly this.

Just type in what style you want - AI picks real outfits from real brands and tries them on you in seconds.

Ready to dress for yourself?

App link in bio.
